fixture.description: New code issues one DB query per loop iteration (N+1), using a parameterized query so the only issue is performance.

grader.rubric: PASS if the report flags an N+1 / query-in-a-loop performance problem in listOrderTotals (one DB query per order id) at IMPORTANT, DEBT, or SUGGESTED severity, ideally suggesting a single batched query (WHERE order_id IN (...)) or a join. FAIL if the N+1 pattern is missed entirely.

expected_behavior: Performance agent flags the per-iteration DB query (N+1) and suggests batching
expected_not_behavior: Does NOT flag SQL injection (the query is parameterized)
